modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to clear call history on CP-8851 VoIP phone

full_description_text:  
I was trying to remove the call history from my CP-8851 VoIP phone. It keeps showing up on the screen, and I can't find a way to clear it. This is really annoying because I want to keep my call log private. Is there a method to do this?
short_description: Need to clear call history on CP-8851 VoIP phone
description: I was trying to remove the call history from my CP-8851 VoIP phone. It keeps showing up on the screen, and I can't find a way to clear it. This is really annoying because I want to keep my call log private. Is there a method to do this?
